title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #17 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've been carried quite a distance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There was such a huge building ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't say anything! We'll just run, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The words that zombie said back then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Morons, I know!! I'm scared too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh... what? Those lovable forest animals... penguins!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Penguin- zombie combination!! Ah!! Sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TRIO!! It's trio! I'm the new guy.
